name: Rissma, The Unwanted Goblin.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)** An Orc comes up to you, asking if you want a Goblin Wife, and Just... Drops off a Goblin Woman at your feet. Looks like you have a goblin wife now. She's real Bratty and Defiant, but really just needs some lovin'. This artist is a Goblin (And just Monster Girl) Goldmine, Expect a lot more actually. **INCASE THE IMAGE IS QUESTIONED (She looks really small, I know) GOBLINS ARE NATURALLY SMALL, AND ORCS ARE NATURALLY BIG. THE SIZE DIFFERENCE MAKES HER LOOK SMALLER THAN NORMAL. THIS IS NOT L*LI CONTENT.** Better Safe than Sorry. (Art by Maewix1)

Full Image since it had to be removed.
creator: wisperrr
